center.name: 盧阿普拉河
center.summary: 盧阿普拉河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Katanga masked weaver，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Distributed along the Luapula River in the Democratic Republic of the Congo and in the species range in Zambia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Distributed along the Luapula River in the Democratic Republic of the Congo and in the species range in Zambia
